records.ety: [L. non not + plus more, further. See Plural.]

defs: A state or condition which baffles reason or confounds judgment; insuperable difficulty; inability to proceed or decide; puzzle; quandary.
quotes: Both of them are a perfect nonplus and baffle to all human understanding.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Nonplused (?) or Nonplussed; p. pr. & vb. n. Nonplusing or Nonplussing.]

defs: To puzzle; to confound; to perplex; to cause to stop by embarrassment.
quotes: He has been nonplused by Mr. Dry's desiring him to tell what it was that he endeavored to prove.
